Package batch.deprecated

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    BatchConsole
    The primary Command Line Interface (CLI) entry point for the batch processing engine.
    BatchExecutor
    Automates the batch processing of image files by copying, renaming, and chronologically sorting them based on their EXIF metadata, such as DateTimeOriginal.
    DefaultTimestampComparator
    Comparator that sorts MediaFile objects by timestamp in ascending order.
    DescendingTimestampComparator
    Comparator that sorts MediaFile objects by timestamp in descending order.
    MediaFile
    Represents metadata for a single media file, including the file path, capture date, file format, and metadata availability.
